message:
perf(pager): eagerly create PageData in StagedPage::from_buf — eliminate lazy copy

V1.3: StagedPage::published_page() was lazy — first read of a dirty page
triggered PageData::from_vec(as_page_bytes().to_vec()), a 4KB copy + Arc
allocation. Now from_buf() eagerly populates the OnceLock at write time,
amortizing the cost into the write path (which already has the bytes).

Subsequent reads via published_page() get a cheap Arc clone (~5ns).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
